'''dahate''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adverbs|adverb]] meaning "[[Wikt:yesterweek|yesterweek]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| d-h-ch
|-
! Word class
| [[Adverb]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:yesterweek|yesterweek]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| dahate
|}

== Inflected forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].[[present]] || [[word:dahate|dahate]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dahatesher|dahatesher]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dahatesherĂ«m|dahatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dahatero|dahatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dahateshĂ«|dahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dahateshĂ«m|dahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidahatero|gokidahatero]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidahateshĂ«|gokidahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidahateshĂ«m|gokidahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godahankerom|godahankerom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godahankeshĂ«|godahankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godahankeshĂ«m|godahankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godahankeya|godahankeya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dahaterom|dahaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dahatemu|dahatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dahateya|dahateya]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidahaterom|gokidahaterom]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidahatemu|gokidahatemu]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidahateya|gokidahateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[present]] || [[word:dahahate|dahahate]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dahahatesher|dahahatesher]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dahahatesherĂ«m|dahahatesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dahahatero|dahahatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dahahateshĂ«|dahahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dahahateshĂ«m|dahahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidahahatero|gokidahahatero]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidahahateshĂ«|gokidahahateshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidahahateshĂ«m|gokidahahateshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godahahankerom|godahahankerom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godahahankeshĂ«|godahahankeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godahahankeshĂ«m|godahahankeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godahahankeya|godahahankeya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dahahaterom|dahahaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dahahatemu|dahahatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dahahateya|dahahateya]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidahahaterom|gokidahahaterom]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidahahatemu|gokidahahatemu]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidahahateya|gokidahahateya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[present]] || [[word:dĂŠhĂŠte|dĂŠhĂŠte]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dĂŠhĂŠtesher|dĂŠhĂŠtesher]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dĂŠhĂŠtesherĂ«m|dĂŠhĂŠtesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dĂŠhĂŠtero|dĂŠhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«|dĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m|dĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidĂŠhĂŠtero|gokidĂŠhĂŠtero]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«|gokidĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m|gokidĂŠhĂŠteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godĂŠhĂŠnkerom|godĂŠhĂŠnkerom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«|godĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«m|godĂŠhĂŠnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godĂŠhĂŠnkeya|godĂŠhĂŠnkeya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dĂŠhĂŠterom|dĂŠhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dĂŠhĂŠtemu|dĂŠhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dĂŠhĂŠteya|dĂŠhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidĂŠhĂŠterom|gokidĂŠhĂŠterom]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidĂŠhĂŠtemu|gokidĂŠhĂŠtemu]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidĂŠhĂŠteya|gokidĂŠhĂŠteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[present]] || [[word:dafhafte|dafhafte]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]] || [[word:dafhaftesher|dafhaftesher]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[mythic]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dafhaftesherĂ«m|dafhaftesherĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dafhaftero|dafhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[visual]] || [[word:dafhafteshĂ«|dafhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[past]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dafhafteshĂ«m|dafhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidafhaftero|gokidafhaftero]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gokidafhafteshĂ«|gokidafhafteshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hesternal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidafhafteshĂ«m|gokidafhafteshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:godafhafnkerom|godafhafnkerom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:godafhafnkeshĂ«|godafhafnkeshĂ«]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:godafhafnkeshĂ«m|godafhafnkeshĂ«m]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:godafhafnkeya|godafhafnkeya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:dafhafterom|dafhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:dafhaftemu|dafhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[future]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:dafhafteya|dafhafteya]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[auditory]] || [[word:gokidafhafterom|gokidafhafterom]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gokidafhaftemu|gokidafhaftemu]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[crastinal]]_[[intentional]] || [[word:gokidafhafteya|gokidafhafteya]]
|}

''76 forms generated.''

== See also ==
